title: Living in Boulder vlog 4 - 20 & 21 - 20017: BouldeRome page

enrichment.summary: Kyle vlogs for April 20-21, 2017, recapping two days of work on his BouldeRome website project — specifically a time chart and timeline comparing Boulder, Colorado to Rome. He discusses sobriety plans, a tax return mistake with TurboTax, and plans to eventually launch a Patreon page for the project.
enrichment.speaker: kyle

stances.position: wants to sober up but is still smoking, rationalizing it since he's not biking anymore
hesitant to launch too soon while the website is still underdeveloped
enthusiastic and deeply invested, sees it as a large, multi-stage research project
